title: Dynast
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Grand_Dukha.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The [[Grand Dukha|Grand ''Dhuka'']] and the [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] Dynasts.]]

'''Dynast''' was the title used to describe the leader of a [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] clan. They usually met in the [[Grand Dukha|Grand ''Dhuka'']] to meet and discuss issues involving the whole of [[Honoghr/Legends|Honoghr]], as well as pay tribute to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] when Honoghr was subordinate to it.

It is unknown what duties or powers the dynast and the [[Maitrakh|''maitrakh'']] shared but they seemed to hold some authority over the ''maitrakhs''.

==History==
When [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] went to speak to the dynasts in the [[Grand Dukha|Grand ''Dhuka'']], there were thirteen middle-aged male dynasts.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}}
